summary: Staged Step 5 changes align with the Opus-delegated visual/component consistency plan. The diff standardizes card treatments, fixes the homepage Serial USB label inconsistency, preserves public routes and metadata, and does not introduce new workflows, dependencies, or scope creep.
plan_section: Step 5: Opus-delegated component consistency and visual UX polish

plan_alignment.notes: Changes are limited to moderate component/card polish and label consistency while preserving the IA contracts from Steps 1-4.

correctness_safety.notes: Links remain internal via Next Link or safe external anchors; no route, metadata, JSON-LD, dependency, or runtime behavior changes were introduced.

code_quality.notes: The diff reduces bespoke card markup on /tools and aligns handoff card styling across representative guide pages.

completeness.notes: Acceptance criteria are satisfied for the scoped visual polish, with all four tools and guide handoffs remaining visible.

patterns.notes: Changes use existing panel, panel-elevated, focus-ring, and ToolCard patterns rather than introducing a new UI system.

integration.notes: Staged files integrate with existing shared brand components and preserve public route structure.

verification_notes: Implementer reported npm run lint passed.
Implementer reported npm run typecheck passed.
Implementer reported npm run build passed with 41 pages generated.
Implementer reported targeted Playwright smoke passed 22/22.
Implementer reported production browser checks across /, /start, /map, /tools, /guides, /tools/serial-usb, /guides/getting-started, and /guides/repeater-setup.
Reviewer inspected staged file list and scoped staged diff.
